title: Purple Greened Nether
description: Replaces crimson to purple and warped forests to green color. (works good with shaders and without too!)
body:
# Info
**Replaces crimson forests to purple color and warped forests to green color.
Full list:**
- Crimson/Warped logs and stripped logs
- Crimson/Warped planks
- Crimson/Warped trapdoors
- Crimson/Warped doors
- Crimson/Warped fungus
- Crimson/Warped nylium
- Crimson/Warped roots
- Crimson/Warped roots pot
- Crimson/Warped nether wart blocks
- Crimson twisting vines plant
- Warped weeping vines

**You can use my resourcepack however you want as long as you credit me!**
